OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-FEB-20-2013:
Plaintiff YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. is represented by Mitchell Brown who is present with Attorney S. Clinton Woods
Defendant THOMAS BURNS is present with Attorney Kimberly Shindel representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Olan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed. The trial date of FEB-25-2013 is vacated.
